export default "
\n \n
\n
\n
\n \n T\n TechHub\n \n
\n
\n \n ◼\n {{ windowEntries().length }}\n \n \n ◻\n {{ minimizedWindowCount() }}\n \n
\n \n {{ topCollapsed() ? '▼' : '▲' }}\n \n
\n \n
\n
\n \n\n @for (windowEntry of windowEntries(); track windowEntry.id) {\n \n }\n
\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n
\n S\n \n @if (searchQuery()) {\n \n }\n
\n
\n \n
\n @for (card of filteredCards(); track card.id) {\n
\n
\n {{ card.icon }}\n
\n

{{ card.title }}

\n

{{ card.description }}

\n Click to learn more\n
\n } @empty {\n
\n ?\n

No matching cards for \"{{ searchQuery() }}\"

\n
\n }\n
\n
\n\n \n
\n
\n \n
\n
\n
\n
\n \n {{ wsConnectionState() | titlecase }}\n @if (wsPort()) {\n • Port: {{ wsPort() }}\n }\n @if (wsLastError()) {\n • {{ wsLastError() }}\n }\n \n
\n
\n \n Latency:\n {{ wsLatency() }}ms\n \n \n Uptime:\n {{ formatUptime(wsUptime()) }}\n \n
\n \n
\n\n \n @if (!bottomCollapsed()) {\n
\n \n
\n @for (tab of bottomPanelTabs; track tab.id) {\n \n }\n \n
\n\n \n
\n @if (activeBottomTab() === 'devtools') {\n \n } @else if (activeBottomTab() === 'overview') {\n
\n
\n Runtime\n WebUI (GTK/WebKit)\n
\n
\n Status\n \n {{ wsConnectionState() === 'connected' ? 'Ready' : wsConnectionState() }}\n \n
\n
\n } @else if (activeBottomTab() === 'metrics') {\n
\n
\n Memory\n 24.5 MB\n
\n
\n CPU\n 2.3%\n
\n
\n Windows\n {{ windowEntries().length }}\n
\n
\n } @else if (activeBottomTab() === 'events') {\n
\n
\n Events Today\n 12\n
\n
\n Errors\n 0\n
\n
\n Last Event\n 2m ago\n
\n
\n } @else if (activeBottomTab() === 'connection') {\n
\n
\n Latency\n {{ wsLatency() }}ms\n
\n
\n Uptime\n {{ formatUptime(wsUptime()) }}\n
\n
\n Success Rate\n {{ wsTotalCalls() > 0 ? (wsSuccessfulCalls() / wsTotalCalls() * 100 | number:'1.0-0') : 100 }}%\n
\n
\n } @else if (activeBottomTab() === 'info') {\n
\n
\n Version\n 1.0.0\n
\n
\n Build\n 2024.02.18\n
\n
\n Stack\n Angular + Rust\n
\n
\n }\n
\n
\n }\n
\n
\n\n \n \n
\n";
